name: Endless Engine Argyro System
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>尽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>関</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アルギロ・システム
desc: Send 1 "Therion" card from your Deck to the GY. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Therion" card in your GY; if both are still in your GY, add either that card or this card to your hand, and if you do, place the other on the bottom of your Deck. You can only use 1 "Endless Engine Argyro System" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Send 1 "Therion" card from your Deck to the GY. If this card is in your GY: You can target 1 "Therion" card in your GY; if both are still in your GY, add either that card or this card to your hand, and if you do, place the other on the bottom of your Deck. You can only use 1 "Endless Engine Argyro System" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
Places itself from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
